fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the application area that the analysis view budget entry belongs to:
Sales: The analysis view budget entry applies to Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis view budget entry applies to Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis view budget entry applies to Inventory
The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Analysis View Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the code for the analysis view that the analysis view budget entries are linked to. The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Budget Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the budget that the analysis view budget entries are linked to.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that the analysis view budget entry is linked to.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the analysis view budget entry is linked to either a customer or a vendor. The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer or the vendor if the analysis view budget entry is linked to either a customer or a vendor. The contents of this field cannot be changed. The program determines if the analysis view budget entry is linked to a customer or a vendor using the contents of the Source Type field.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location to which the analysis view budget entry was posted.

fields.name: Dimension 1 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value you selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 1 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 2 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which dimension value you have selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 2 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Dimension 3 Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which dimension value you have selected for the analysis view dimension that you defined as Dimension 1 on the analysis view card.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the item budget entries in an analysis view budget entry were posted.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the item budget entry number for the analysis view budget entry.
The contents of this field cannot be changed.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item budget entry quantity included in an analysis view budget entry.

fields.name: Sales Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item budget entry sales amount included in an analysis view budget entry.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item budget entry cost amount included in an analysis view budget entry.
